title: Cheese Server Modpack
description: A magic, tech and farming modpack made for the "Emergency Cheese" discord server.
body:
### This is a modpack for the **Emergency Cheese** discord server.

The modpack was put together with the goal of adding a lot of content, from many different genres. You can find mods that add new content such as dungeons, monsters, magic, technology, giant world generation, space travel and even mods from the Doctor Who universe. This was to ensure that no one from the server would grow bored.

And since many from the Cheese server simply want to chill, build and farm, many decoration mods with many different themes have been added. Different mods like "Critters and Companions", "Hamsters", "Loaf cats", many "[Let's Do]" and "Farmers delight mods" were added, along with many of their addons.

In general, this modpack was made so it would be easier to install, change and update as we go.

**Remember, this modpack was made for a private Discord server just for fun. So any mod support and such will most likely be non-existent.**
